parameters.query:
SELECT ps.url, ps.title,
  TRIM(split_part(split_part(coalesce(ps.title,''),' купить',1),' |',1)) as brand,
  CASE WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-gift-card' THEN 'Gift Card'
       WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-currency' THEN 'Currency'
       WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-game-keys' THEN 'Game Keys'
       WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-accounts' THEN 'Accounts'
       WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-subscription' THEN 'Subscription'
       ELSE 'Other' END as category
FROM page_seo ps
WHERE ps.lang='ru' AND ps.url LIKE '%/t/%'
  AND (ps.description IS NULL OR length(ps.description)=0)
  AND length(coalesce(ps.title,''))>5
  AND ps.title ~ '^[a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]'
ORDER BY
  -- 1. Топ бренды по объёму продаж и трафику
  CASE
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%nutaku%'          THEN 1
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%telegram-star%'   THEN 2
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%steam-top-up%'    THEN 3
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%steam-wallet%'    THEN 4
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%roblox%'          THEN 5
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%minecraft%'       THEN 6
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%pubg%'            THEN 7
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%genshin%'         THEN 8
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%xbox%'            THEN 9
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%playstation%'     THEN 10
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%nintendo%'        THEN 11
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%spotify%'         THEN 12
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%discord%'         THEN 13
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%chatgpt%'         THEN 14
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%valorant%'        THEN 15
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%mobile-legends%'  THEN 16
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%fortnite%'        THEN 17
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%warframe%'        THEN 18
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%call-of-duty%'    THEN 19
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%ea-sport%'        THEN 20
    -- 2. По категории
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-currency'        THEN 50
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-gift-card'       THEN 60
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-game-keys'       THEN 70
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-subscription'    THEN 80
    ELSE 100
  END,
  -- 3. Внутри категории — по алфавиту (стабильный порядок)
  ps.url
LIMIT 890

UPDATE page_seo SET
  title='{{ $json.title }}',
  description='{{ $json.description }}',
  h1='{{ $json.h1 }}',
  article=CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.article }}' != '' AND '{{ $json.article }}' != 'null'
    THEN '{{ $json.article }}'
    ELSE article
  END,
  faq=CASE 
    WHEN '{{ $json.faq }}' != '' AND '{{ $json.faq }}' != '[]'
    THEN '{{ $json.faq }}'::jsonb
    ELSE faq
  END,
  updated_at=now()
WHERE url='{{ $json.url }}' AND lang='ru'
  AND '{{ $json.ok }}' = 'true'
RETURNING id::text, url

SELECT ps.url, ps.title,
  TRIM(split_part(split_part(coalesce(ps.title,''),' купить',1),' |',1)) as brand,
  CASE WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-gift-card' THEN 'Gift Card'
       WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-currency' THEN 'Currency'
       WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-game-keys' THEN 'Game Keys'
       WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-accounts' THEN 'Accounts'
       WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-subscription' THEN 'Subscription'
       ELSE 'Other' END as category
FROM page_seo ps
WHERE ps.lang='ru' AND ps.url LIKE '%/t/%'
  AND (ps.description IS NULL OR length(ps.description)=0)

    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%pubg%'            THEN 7

    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%playstation%'     THEN 10
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%nintendo%'        THEN 11
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%spotify%'         THEN 12
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%discord%'         THEN 13
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%chatgpt%'         THEN 14
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%valorant%'        THEN 15
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%mobile-legends%'  THEN 16
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%fortnite%'        THEN 17
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%warframe%'        THEN 18
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%call-of-duty%'    THEN 19
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%ea-sport%'        THEN 20

    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-currency'        THEN 50
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-gift-card'       THEN 60
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-game-keys'       THEN 70
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-subscription'    THEN 80
    ELSE 100
  END,
  -- 3. Внутри категории — по алфавиту (стабильный порядок)
  ps.url
LIMIT 890

UPDATE page_seo SET
  description='{{ $json.description }}',
  h1='{{ $json.h1 }}',
  faq=CASE 
    WHEN '{{ $json.faq }}' != '' AND '{{ $json.faq }}' != '[]'
    THEN '{{ $json.faq }}'::jsonb
    ELSE faq
  END,
  updated_at=now()
WHERE url='{{ $json.url }}' AND lang='ru'
  AND '{{ $json.ok }}' = 'true'
RETURNING id::text, url
